description: Browser Intent capability pack manifest binding for Pack Runtime route gates, frontend sync, and lightweight browser SDK import discovery.
principles: Expose browser connection, capture, OCR, OPP, extension session/action, and scenario execution as an optional Pack Runtime capability instead of a hard-coded main-shell feature.
Keep browser method/path gates, frontend menu/route sync, and SDK import metadata in the pack manifest.
Let external projects import yunque-client/browser only when the Browser Intent pack is installed and enabled.
